description_long: This object represents a firefighter, depicted in a standing pose with a helmet and what appears to be a fire axe in hand. The figure is outfitted in dark protective clothing, likely turnout gear, with some red and yellow accents visible, suggesting high-visibility elements. The helmet is rounded and sits atop the head, while the face is partially obscured, possibly by a mask or visor. The firefighter's stance is dynamic, with one arm extended, gripping the axe, and the other arm bent at the side. The overall form is slender and the details are minimal, with only the most essential features of the uniform and equipment visible. There are no visible insignia or breathing apparatus, and the model appears simplified, lacking fine surface detail.
description: A simplified firefighter figure in dark turnout gear with a helmet and fire axe, featuring minimal detail and high-visibility accents.
description_view_0: From this angle, the helmet and axe are most visible, with the arm holding the axe extended outward.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the length of the axe and the profile of the helmet, with the body mostly obscured.
description_view_2: The figure appears very slender from this angle, with the axe handle and helmet edge visible.
description_view_3: The axe head and helmet are prominent, with the arm and hand gripping the axe clearly shown.
